name: Tex-Mex Mac 'n Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown the ground beef or turkey with the chopped bell pepper, onion, and mushrooms.
2. Stir in the tomato paste and water. Add the whole kernel corn (undrained).
3. Cook the macaroni and cheese according to package directions. If needed, add milk and margarine.
4. Mix the cooked macaroni and cheese into the beef mixture.
5. Combine well and serve.
